notes: Core mechanics work (shooting, splitting, UFO, lives, waves) but ship respawn resets to center without clearing nearby asteroids creating unfair deaths, asteroid point generation has a bug (loop variable mismatch causing irregular shapes), and the UFO is rendered as a simple ellipse without the classic saucer shape; overall a functional but rough implementation.

A competent Asteroids clone with working waves, shooting, splitting, lives, pause and UFOs, but it has notable polish/gamefeel issues like no thrust feedback, simplistic collisions/respawn handling, capped timestep behavior, and only approximate visual/authentic fidelity.
